content: GANDHI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY , ODISHA, GUNUPUR (GIET UNIVERSITY) DIST- RAYAGADA (ODISHA), PIN-765022 [Establlshed vide Odisha Act-23 of 2018, Included by UGC and Approved AICTE, New Delhi] OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS Ref. No. GIETU/Exam/2025/|6%% Date: - 22/11/2025 NOTICE This is to inform all concerned students that the second-half classes scheduled for today (22.11.2025) are suspended due to administrative reasons. This is for information of all the students concerned. GIET University Memo No: |539(85) Date: 22.11.2025 Copy to: Vice- Chancellor/ Registrar/Dean SoET for information. All HoDs/ All Coordinators/ all hostels for information and necessary action. They are requested to inform the students. W}ﬁ( Controller of Examinations GIETU Website/Notice Board. GIET University
